subparts.text: What is steel table? What information is available in steel tables as per SP 6.

Explain walls and piers of masonry building.
Find the safe column load of a steel column. ISMB = 300 Effective length = 3.45m, Area= 56.26 cm², RXX =12.37cm, RYY = 2.65cm. SR Permissible compressive stress 130 57 140 51
